offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes workflow inefficiencies. We generate weekly claims status summaries instead of manual tracking through emails and spreadsheets.
problem: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to inefficient workflow.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Indie Hackers discussions on workflow tools
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo link
Engage in community forums for claims processing
try_it: Let users try weekly summary generation and email notifications for updates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
